column6: ISOC ONLY. NOT merged with nedko's 'Amazon CloudFront' (row 3). Reason: nedko's 'Amazon CloudFront' fires only on a narrow signature (header x-amz-cf-id, cname .cloudfront.net -- source: cdn-check/app.py). ISOC's 'amazon' is a bare company-name label whose detection method is undocumented (ISOC's host_cdn detection method is undocumented (project's own methodology_datasets.md, Sec 2.8: "Amreesh's detection methodology for which CDN a given domain uses is not fully documented in this dataset. The dataset records the result of CDN classification, not the process.")) and could plausibly include any AWS-hosted domain (EC2, S3, Lightsail, etc.), not only the CloudFront CDN product specifically. Same legal entity as row 3, but the two labels are NOT confirmed to measure the same underlying phenomenon -- flagging for your manual check rather than assuming equivalence.
